sessionEnd.powershell: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path 'logs/session' | Out-Null; Add-Content -Path ('logs/session/' + (Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd') + '.log') -Value ('[' + (Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') + '] [sessionEnd] Session ended')
sessionEnd.bash: mkdir -p logs/session && echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] [sessionEnd] Session ended" >> logs/session/$(date '+%Y-%m-%d').log
